[package]
name = "keyboard-types"
version = "0.8.3"
authors = ["Pyfisch <pyfisch@posteo.org>"]
description = "Contains types to define keyboard related events."
readme = "README.md"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/rust-windowing/keyboard-types"
keywords = ["keyboard", "input", "event", "webdriver"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.71"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true

[features]
default = ["std"]
serde = ["dep:serde", "bitflags/serde"]
std = ["serde?/std"]
webdriver = ["dep:unicode-segmentation", "std"]

[dependencies]
bitflags = "2"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.0"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.unicode-segmentation]
version = "1.2.0"
optional = true

[package]
name = "selectors"
version = "0.37.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/selectors/"
description = "CSS Selectors matching for Rust"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["css", "selectors"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2021"
build = "build.rs"

[lib]
name = "selectors"
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
bench = []
to_shmem = ["dep:to_shmem", "dep:to_shmem_derive"]

[dependencies]
bitflags = "2"
cssparser = "0.36"
rustc-hash = "2.1.1"
log = "0.4"
phf = "0.13"
precomputed-hash = "0.1"
smallvec = "1.0"
new_debug_unreachable = "1"

[dependencies.derive_more]
version = "2"
features = ["add", "add_assign"]

[dependencies.servo_arc]
version = "0.4.3"
path = "./servo_arc"

[dependencies.to_shmem]
optional = true
version = "0.3.0"
path = "./to_shmem"
features = ["servo"]

[dependencies.to_shmem_derive]
optional = true
version = "0.1.0"
path = "./to_shmem_derive"

[build-dependencies]
phf_codegen = "0.13"

[package]
name = "servo"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."
readme = "../../README.md"

[lib]
name = "servo"
path = "lib.rs"
crate-type = ["rlib"]

[features]
default = ["baked-in-resources", "clipboard", "js_jit"]
background_hang_monitor = ["servo-background-hang-monitor/sampler"]
baked-in-resources = ["dep:servo-default-resources"]
bluetooth = ["servo-bluetooth-traits", "dep:servo-bluetooth", "servo-constellation/bluetooth", "servo-constellation-traits/bluetooth", "script/bluetooth", "script_traits/bluetooth"]
clipboard = ["dep:arboard"]
crown = ["script/crown"]
debugmozjs = ["script/debugmozjs"]
dynamic_freetype = ["webrender/dynamic_freetype"]
gamepad = ["script/gamepad", "servo-constellation/gamepad", "embedder_traits/gamepad"]
jitspew = ["script/jitspew"]
js_backtrace = ["script/js_backtrace"]
js_jit = ["script/js_jit"]
media-gstreamer = ["servo-media-gstreamer", "gstreamer"]
native-bluetooth = ["servo-bluetooth/native-bluetooth"]
no-wgl = ["mozangle/egl", "mozangle/build_dlls", "surfman/sm-angle-default", "paint_api/no-wgl"]
profilemozjs = ["script/profilemozjs"]
refcell_backtrace = ["script/refcell_backtrace"]
testbinding = ["script/testbinding"]
tracing = ["dep:tracing", "paint/tracing", "servo-constellation/tracing", "fonts/tracing", "layout/tracing", "profile_traits/tracing", "script/tracing", "net/tracing"]
vello = ["servo-constellation/vello"]
webgl_backtrace = ["script/webgl_backtrace", "webgl/webgl_backtrace", "servo-canvas-traits/webgl_backtrace"]
webgpu = ["dep:webgpu", "script/webgpu", "paint/webgpu", "servo-constellation/webgpu", "servo-constellation-traits/webgpu"]
webxr = ["dep:webxr", "dep:webxr-api", "paint/webxr", "webgl/webxr", "script/webxr"]

[dependencies]
bitflags = "2.11"
crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
dpi = "0.1"
env_logger = "0.11"
euclid = "0.22"
http = "1.4"
ipc-channel = "0.21"
log = "0.4.29"
mozangle = "0.5.5"
rustc-hash = "2.1.2"
serde = "1.0.228"
url = "2.5"
webrender_api = "0.68"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.24.0"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.cookie]
package = "cookie"
version = "0.18"

[dependencies.devtools]
package = "servo-devtools"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/devtools"

[dependencies.devtools_traits]
package = "servo-devtools-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/devtools"

[dependencies.embedder_traits]
package = "servo-embedder-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/embedder"

[dependencies.fonts]
package = "servo-fonts"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/fonts"

[dependencies.gstreamer]
optional = true
version = "0.25"
features = ["v1_18"]

[dependencies.image]
version = "0.25"
default-features = false
features = ["avif", "rayon", "bmp", "gif", "ico", "jpeg", "png", "webp"]

[dependencies.keyboard-types]
version = "0.8.3"
features = ["serde", "webdriver"]

[dependencies.layout]
package = "servo-layout"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/layout"

[dependencies.layout_api]
package = "servo-layout-api"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/layout"

[dependencies.media]
package = "servo-media-thread"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/media/media-thread"

[dependencies.net]
package = "servo-net"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/net"

[dependencies.net_traits]
package = "servo-net-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/net"

[dependencies.paint]
package = "servo-paint"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/paint"

[dependencies.paint_api]
package = "servo-paint-api"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/paint"

[dependencies.parking_lot]
version = "0.12"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.profile]
package = "servo-profile"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/profile"

[dependencies.profile_traits]
package = "servo-profile-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/profile"

[dependencies.script]
package = "servo-script"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/script"

[dependencies.script_traits]
package = "servo-script-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/script"

[dependencies.servo-background-hang-monitor]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/background_hang_monitor"

[dependencies.servo-base]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/base"

[dependencies.servo-bluetooth]
optional = true
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/bluetooth"

[dependencies.servo-bluetooth-traits]
optional = true
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/bluetooth"

[dependencies.servo-canvas-traits]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/canvas"

[dependencies.servo-config]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/config"

[dependencies.servo-constellation]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/constellation"

[dependencies.servo-constellation-traits]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/constellation"

[dependencies.servo-geometry]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/geometry"

[dependencies.servo-media]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/media/servo-media"

[dependencies.servo-media-dummy]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/media/backends/dummy"

[dependencies.servo-media-gstreamer]
optional = true
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/media/backends/gstreamer"

[dependencies.servo-tracing]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/servo_tracing"

[dependencies.servo-url]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/url"

[dependencies.servo-wakelock]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/wakelock"

[dependencies.storage]
package = "servo-storage"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/storage"

[dependencies.storage_traits]
package = "servo-storage-traits"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/storage"

[dependencies.stylo]
git = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
rev = "a556f4cbd15fc289039261661b049a5dc845cd80"

[dependencies.stylo_traits]
git = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
rev = "a556f4cbd15fc289039261661b049a5dc845cd80"

[dependencies.surfman]
version = "0.12.0"
features = ["chains"]

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["sync"]
version = "1"

[dependencies.tracing]
optional = true
version = "0.1.44"

[dependencies.webgl]
default-features = false
package = "servo-webgl"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/webgl"

[dependencies.webgpu]
optional = true
package = "servo-webgpu"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/webgpu"

[dependencies.webrender]
version = "0.68"
features = ["capture"]

[dependencies.webxr-api]
optional = true
package = "servo-webxr-api"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/webxr"

[target."cfg(not(target_env = \"ohos\"))".dependencies.servo-default-resources]
optional = true
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/default-resources"

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"android\", target_env = \"ohos\"))".dependencies.webxr]
optional = true
package = "servo-webxr"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/webxr"

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_env = \"ohos\")))".dependencies.arboard]
optional = true
version = "3"

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_env = \"ohos\")))".dependencies.webxr]
features = ["glwindow", "headless"]
package = "servo-webxr"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/webxr"

[target."cfg(all(not(target_os = \"windows\"), not(target_os = \"ios\"), not(target_os = \"android\"), not(target_env = \"ohos\"), not(target_arch = \"arm\"), not(target_arch = \"aarch64\")))".dependencies]
gaol = "0.2.1"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.webxr]
features = ["glwindow", "headless", "openxr-api"]
package = "servo-webxr"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/webxr"

[target."cfg(target_env = \"ohos\")".dependencies.servo-media-ohos]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/media/backends/ohos"

[dev-dependencies]
accesskit_consumer = "0.35.0"
http = "1.4"
http-body-util = "0.1"
hyper = "1.9"
itertools = "0.14"
tracing = "0.1.44"
winit = "0.30.13"

[dev-dependencies.net]
features = ["test-util"]
package = "servo-net"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/net"

[dev-dependencies.rustls]
version = "0.23"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.servo]
path = "."
features = ["tracing"]

[[test]]
name = "multiprocess"
harness = false

[package]
name = "servo-allocator"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
allocation-tracking = ["backtrace", "dep:rustc-hash", "log"]
use-system-allocator = ["libc"]

[dependencies.backtrace]
optional = true
version = "0.3"

[dependencies.log]
optional = true
version = "0.4.29"

[dependencies.rustc-hash]
optional = true
version = "2.1.2"

[target."cfg(not(any(windows, target_env = \"ohos\")))".dependencies]
tikv-jemalloc-sys = "0.6.1"
tikv-jemallocator = "0.6.1"

[target."cfg(not(any(windows, target_env = \"ohos\")))".dependencies.libc]
optional = true
version = "0.2"

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.windows-sys]
features = ["Win32_System_Memory"]
version = "0.61"

[target."cfg(target_env = \"ohos\")".dependencies]
libc = "0.2"

[package]
name = "servo-background-hang-monitor"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."

[lib]
name = "servo_background_hang_monitor"
path = "lib.rs"
test = false
doctest = false

[dependencies]
backtrace = "0.3"
crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
libc = "0.2"
log = "0.4.29"
rustc-hash = "2.1.2"
serde_json = "1.0"

[dependencies.rustc-demangle]
version = "0.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.servo-background-hang-monitor-api]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/background_hang_monitor"

[dependencies.servo-base]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/base"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.mach2]
optional = true
version = "0.6"

[target."cfg(all(target_os = \"linux\", not(any(target_arch = \"arm\", target_arch = \"aarch64\", target_env = \"ohos\", target_env = \"musl\"))))".dependencies.nix]
features = ["signal"]
optional = true
version = "0.30"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.nix]
features = ["signal"]
optional = true
version = "0.30"

[features]
sampler = ["mach2", "nix", "rustc-demangle"]

[package]
name = "servo-background-hang-monitor-api"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."

[lib]
name = "background_hang_monitor_api"
path = "lib.rs"
test = false
doctest = false

[dependencies]
serde = "1.0.228"

[dependencies.servo-base]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/shared/base"

[package]
name = "servo-base"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."

[lib]
name = "servo_base"
path = "lib.rs"
test = true
doctest = false

[dependencies]
crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
ipc-channel = "0.21"
malloc_size_of_derive = "0.1"
rayon = "1"
serde = "1.0.228"
serde_json = "1.0"
webrender_api = "0.68"
log = "0.4.29"
regex = "1.12"
unicode-segmentation = "1.13.2"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.24.0"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.malloc_size_of]
package = "servo-malloc-size-of"
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/malloc_size_of"

[dependencies.parking_lot]
version = "0.12"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.servo-config]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/config"

[dependencies.time]
package = "time"
version = "0.3"
features = ["large-dates", "local-offset", "serde"]

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"macos\", target_os = \"ios\"))".dependencies]
mach2 = "0.6"

[target."cfg(all(unix, not(any(target_os = \"macos\", target_os = \"ios\"))))".dependencies]
libc = "0.2"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows-sys]
features = ["Win32_System_Performance"]
version = "0.61"

[dependencies.syn]

[package]
name = "servo-constellation"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false
rust-version = "1.86.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/servo"
description = "A component of the servo web-engine."

[lib]
name = "servo_constellation"
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
default = []
bluetooth = ["servo-bluetooth-traits"]
gamepad = ["embedder_traits/gamepad"]
tracing = ["dep:tracing", "servo-canvas/tracing"]
vello = ["servo-canvas/vello"]
webgpu = ["dep:webgpu", "dep:webgpu_traits", "script_traits/webgpu"]

[lints.clippy]
unwrap_used = "deny"
panic = "deny"

[dependencies]
backtrace = "0.3"
base64 = "0.22.1"
crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
euclid = "0.22"
ipc-channel = "0.21"
log = "0.4.29"
rand = "0.9"
rustc-hash = "2.1.2"
serde = "1.0.228"

[dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.24.0"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.content-security-policy]
version = "0.8.0"

[dependencies.devtools_traits]

path = "components/shared/devtools"

[dependencies.embedder_traits]

version = "0.1.0"

[dependencies.fonts]

version = "0.1.0"
path = "components/fonts"

[dependencies.keyboard-types]
version = "0.8.3"
features = ["serde", "webdriver"]

[dependencies.layout_api]
package = "servo-layout-api"

package = "stylo_malloc_size_of"
features = ["servo"]

[dependencies.web_atoms]
version = "0.2.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.mime]
version = "0.3.13"
optional = true

[dependencies.num_cpus]
version = "1.1.0"

[dependencies.selectors]
version = "0.37.0"
path = "./selectors"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
optional = true
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.servo_arc]
version = "0.4.3"
path = "./servo_arc"

[dependencies.stylo_atoms]
optional = true
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./stylo_atoms"

[dependencies.static_prefs]
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./stylo_static_prefs"
package = "stylo_static_prefs"

[dependencies.string_cache]
version = "0.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.style_derive]
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./style_derive"
package = "stylo_derive"

[dependencies.style_traits]
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./style_traits"
features = ["servo"]
package = "stylo_traits"

[dependencies.to_shmem]
version = "0.3.0"
path = "./to_shmem"
features = ["servo"]

[dependencies.to_shmem_derive]
version = "0.1.0"
path = "./to_shmem_derive"

[dependencies.url]
version = "2.5"
optional = true
features = ["serde"]

[build-dependencies]
walkdir = "2.1.4"

[build-dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"
features = ["std"]

[build-dependencies.bindgen]
version = "0.69"
optional = true
default-features = false

[build-dependencies.regex]
version = "1.0"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["perf", "std"]

[build-dependencies.toml]
version = "0.5"
optional = true
default-features = false

[build-dependencies.mozbuild]
version = "0.1"
optional = true

[package]
name = "stylo_atoms"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/stylo_atoms/"
description = "Interned string type for the Servo and Stylo projects"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2018"
build = "build.rs"
readme = "../README.md"

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[dependencies]
string_cache = "0.9"

[build-dependencies]
string_cache_codegen = "0.6.1"

[package]
name = "stylo_derive"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
edition = "2021"
description = "Derive crate for Stylo CSS engine"
readme = "../README.md"

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1"
quote = "1"
synstructure = "0.13"

[dependencies.darling]
version = "0.20"
default-features = false

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2"
default-features = false
features = ["clone-impls", "derive", "parsing"]

[package]
name = "stylo_dom"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/stylo_dom/"
description = "DOM state types for Stylo"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
keywords = ["css", "style"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2021"
readme = "../README.md"

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[dependencies]
bitflags = "2"

[dependencies.malloc_size_of]
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./malloc_size_of"
package = "stylo_malloc_size_of"
features = ["servo"]

[package]
name = "stylo_malloc_size_of"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
description = "An allocator-agnostic crate for measuring the heap size of a value"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
gecko = ["thin-vec/gecko-ffi"]
servo = ["string_cache"]

[dependencies]
app_units = "0.7"
cssparser = "0.36"
euclid = "0.22"
smallbitvec = "2.3.0"
smallvec = "1.13"
void = "1.0.2"

[dependencies.selectors]
version = "0.37.0"
path = "./selectors"

[dependencies.servo_arc]
version = "0.4.3"
path = "./servo_arc"

[dependencies.string_cache]
version = "0.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.thin-vec]
version = "0.2.13"

[package]
name = "stylo_static_prefs"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/stylo_static_prefs/"
description = "Configuration for Stylo"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
keywords = ["css", "style"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
edition = "2021"
readme = "../README.md"

[package]
name = "stylo_traits"
version = "0.16.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
edition = "2021"
description = "Types used by the Stylo CSS engine"
readme = "../README.md"

[lib]
name = "style_traits"
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
default = ["servo"]
servo = ["stylo_atoms", "cssparser/serde", "url", "euclid/serde"]
gecko = []

[dependencies]
app_units = "0.7"
bitflags = "2"
cssparser = "0.36"
euclid = "0.22"
malloc_size_of_derive = "0.1"
serde = "1.0"
thin-vec = "0.2"

[dependencies.malloc_size_of]
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./malloc_size_of"
package = "stylo_malloc_size_of"
features = ["servo"]

[dependencies.selectors]
version = "0.37.0"
path = "./selectors"

[dependencies.servo_arc]
version = "0.4.3"
path = "./servo_arc"

[dependencies.stylo_atoms]
optional = true
version = "0.16.0"
path = "./stylo_atoms"

[dependencies.to_shmem]
version = "0.3.0"
path = "./to_shmem"

[dependencies.to_shmem_derive]

path = "./to_shmem_derive"

[dependencies.url]

[package]
name = "to_shmem"
version = "0.3.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
edition = "2021"
description = "Trait to write to a contiguous chunk of shared memory"

[lib]
name = "to_shmem"
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
servo = ["cssparser/serde", "cssparser", "servo_arc", "smallbitvec", "smallvec", "string_cache", "thin-vec"]
gecko = ["thin-vec/gecko-ffi", "cssparser", "servo_arc", "smallbitvec", "smallvec", "thin-vec"]
cssparser = ["dep:cssparser"]
servo_arc = ["dep:servo_arc"]
smallbitvec = ["dep:smallbitvec"]
smallvec = ["dep:smallvec"]
string_cache = ["dep:string_cache"]
thin-vec = ["dep:thin-vec"]

[dependencies.cssparser]
version = "0.36"
optional = true

[dependencies.servo_arc]
optional = true
version = "0.4.3"
path = "./servo_arc"

[dependencies.smallbitvec]
version = "2.3.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.smallvec]
version = "1.13"
optional = true

[dependencies.string_cache]
version = "0.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.thin-vec]
version = "0.2.1"
optional = true

[package]
name = "to_shmem_derive"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = ["The Servo Project Developers"]
license = "MPL-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/servo/stylo"
edition = "2021"
description = "Allows deriving the to_shmem trait."

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1"
quote = "1"
synstructure = "0.13"

[dependencies.darling]
version = "0.20"
default-features = false

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2"
default-features = false
features = ["derive", "parsing"]
